wecom_tips: You can join our exchange group by scanning the QR code below or adding my personal WeChat.
latest_news: Revornix v0.8.0 has been officially released. Welcome to experience and share your feedback.
main_slog: Revornix, an AI agent–centric all-in-one media stream management platform.
sub_slog: Powered by AI — connecting data, analysis, and sharing. Build structured knowledge from massive information so your notes never collect dust again.
hero_outcome: Turn information overload into actionable knowledge that stays usable across your daily workflow.
hero_mcp_description: Revornix can connect to external tools through Stream MCP and Std MCP, and it can also expose MCP capabilities through the API-side api/mcp_router/* routes. The current server-side grouping centers on common, document, section, and graph for general extensions, document knowledge-base interaction, section workflows, and graph capability.
hero_wecom_title: Join the WeChat group for deployment, MCP integration, and feedback
hero_wecom_description: The community QR code is now visible directly on the homepage so you can ask questions, share feedback, and follow product updates faster.
dashboard_description: A brand-new dashboard experience that aggregates more panels.
main_feature_1_description: Collect information easily via web pages or browser extensions
main_feature_2_description: Automatically categorize, summarize, and generate daily highlights
main_feature_3_description: Supports Stream MCP and Std MCP on the client side, with server capabilities exposed through api/mcp_router/*
main_feature_4_description: Use the revornix-publisher skill so OpenClaw can directly work with Revornix documents, sections, labels, and publishing flows
features_description: Focusing on the full chain of collection, analysis, summarization, and sharing, Revornix provides reliable automation at every key stage to help you build a future-ready knowledge operation system.
feature_1_tips: Currently supports websites, PDFs, Word, Excel, PowerPoint, manual text input, APIs, PIP packages, Node.js packages, and more to come.
feature_2_tips: Built on advanced markdown conversion engines such as MinerU, achieving industry-leading accuracy and allowing for custom conversion engines.
feature_3_tips: Powered by personalized GraphRAG and embedding technologies, Revornix converts your inputs into vectorized data and generates a knowledge graph for efficient retrieval and improved model context accuracy.
feature_4_tips: Revornix includes a built-in sharing system — share your knowledge base or access others’ public ones for easy collaboration.
feature_5_tips: The source code is open, and when deployed locally, all data stays on your own servers — ensuring complete data privacy.
feature_6: AI Assistant & Built-in MCP (Model Context Protocol)
feature_6_tips: Revornix includes both MCP client and MCP server capabilities. On the client side it supports Stream MCP and Std MCP; on the server side the capability lives under API routes in api/mcp_router/*, currently grouped mainly into common, document, section, and graph for general extensions, document knowledge-base interaction, section workflows, and graph capability.
feature_7_tips: Model-agnostic — freely choose which models to use. Each feature can be powered by an independent model.
feature_8_tips: The revornix-publisher skill lets OpenClaw directly operate Revornix documents, sections, labels, and file-upload workflows.
growth_description: Revornix is built for information-heavy work. It turns scattered materials into searchable, traceable, and collaborative knowledge assets.
persona_1_description: Convert papers, reports, and web sources into structured knowledge and reduce repeated lookup work.
persona_2_description: Manage ideas, references, and source links in one place to build a reusable topic pipeline.
persona_3_description: Capture team docs and discussion context to reduce knowledge loss and collaboration overhead.
start_step_1_description: Go to app.revornix.com and enter Revornix.
start_step_2_description: Import websites, files, or APIs to establish your knowledge input pipeline.
start_step_3_description: Automatically classify, summarize, notify, and share to keep insights moving.
growth_note: If you need full local control, jump to the Quick Start docs for self-hosted deployment.
trust_1_description: Supports local deployment so core data can stay on your own infrastructure.
trust_2_description: Open-source code and a multi-engine architecture make custom expansion straightforward.
trust_3_description: From collection to analysis to notification, build a continuous knowledge loop.
system_eco_description: Revornix spans knowledge ingestion, automated processing, and multi-platform delivery. The component ecosystem continues to expand, building a flexible and robust knowledge network for you.
system_eco_npm_des: JavaScript package for custom data collection in JS ecosystems
system_eco_pip_des: Python package for developers in the Python ecosystem
system_eco_chrome_plugin_des: Efficient information collection within browser environments
system_eco_ios_app_des: Stay in control of your information flow anytime, anywhere
system_eco_wechat_miniprogram_des: Integrate with the WeChat ecosystem for fast sharing and distribution
